testcase.name: I18nController API error matrix > GET /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 200 with tenant overrides and request id propagation
I18nController API error matrix > GET /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 400 when tenant context is missing
I18nController API error matrix > GET /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 403 when the actor is not a member of the requested tenant
I18nController API error matrix > PUT /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 200 after updating tenant overrides
I18nController API error matrix > PUT /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 400 for malformed JSON
I18nController API error matrix > PUT /_tenancy/i18n/overrides > returns 403 when the actor is not a member of the requested tenant
StynxI18nModule integration > resolves locale order, applies tenant overrides, renders ICU messages, and localizes errors
